title: Roasted Smoky Turkish Chicken Drumsticks Kebabs
description: A kid-friendly Turkish dish featuring smoky chicken drumsticks, this recipe is light and keto-friendly, perfect for a family dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken drumsticks to the bowl and toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
Line a baking sheet with aluminum foil and spray with cooking spray.
Arrange the chicken drumsticks on the baking sheet in a single layer.
Roast the chicken in the preheated oven for 25 minutes.
Brush the chicken with lemon juice and continue roasting for an additional 10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Remove the chicken from the oven and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley, if desired.
Serve the chicken drumsticks hot and enjoy.
